commands.review_summary:
The branch adds QA Lab Crabline runtime env patches for fake Slack and WhatsApp providers, Slack WebClient API-root overrides, and a WhatsApp HTTP API listener path with tests.

PR surface: Source +287, Tests +328. Total +615 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds QA Lab fake-provider capability rather than fixing a current-main bug. Source inspection shows the central env-patch path is not already present on current main.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer/security review should decide whether the endpoint env overrides are QA-only or public channel surfaces before any automated repair chooses an implementation direction.
